name: Diabetic Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
2. Add the butter, eggs, sugar substitute, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
3. Stir in the grated apples and chopped walnuts.
4. Pour the batter into a 9 x 13 inch greased baking pan.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE + 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FRU
IT EXCHANGE
